title.en: RADIO DIRECTION-FINDING; RADIO NAVIGATION; DETERMINING DISTANCE OR VELOCITY BY USE OF RADIO WAVES; LOCATING OR PRESENCE-DETECTING BY USE OF THE REFLECTION OR RERADIATION OF RADIO WAVES; ANALOGOUS ARRANGEMENTS USING OTHER WAVES

Beacons or beacon systems transmitting signals having a characteristic or characteristics capable of being detected by non-directional receivers and defining directions, positions, or position lines fixed relatively to the beacon transmitters; Receivers co-operating therewith (position fixing by co-ordinating a plurality of determinations of direction or position lines G01S5/00)
using radio waves (G01S19/00 takes precedence)
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves

Direction-finders for determining the direction from which infrasonic, sonic, ultrasonic or electromagnetic waves, or particle emission, not having a directional significance, are being received (position-fixing by co-ordinating a plurality of determinations of direction or position lines G01S5/00)
using radio waves
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves

Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more direction or position line determinations; Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more distance determinations {(using active systems G01S13/00, G01S15/00, G01S17/00)}
{Transmission of position information to remote stations (involving assistance data G01S5/0236)}
{Determining conditions which influence positioning, e.g. radio environment, state of motion or energy consumption}
using radio waves (using satellite radio beacon systems for determining position G01S19/00)
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
Details of systems according to groups G01S13/00, G01S15/00, G01S17/00
{Transmission of data between radar, sonar or lidar systems and remote stations}
of systems according to group G01S13/00
of systems according to group G01S17/00
of systems according to group G01S15/00
Systems for determining distance or velocity not using reflection or reradiation (position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more distance determinations G01S5/00)
using radio waves (G01S19/00 takes precedence)
using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
using ultrasonic, sonic or infrasonic waves
using difference in transit time between electrical and acoustic signals
Systems using the reflection or reradiation of radio waves, e.g. radar systems; Analogous systems using reflection or reradiation of waves whose nature or wavelength is irrelevant or unspecified
{Bistatic radar systems; Multistatic radar systems}
{Theoretical aspects (G01S7/418, G01S13/9094, G01S13/958 take precedence)}
Systems using reflection of radio waves, e.g. primary radar systems; Analogous systems
Radar-tracking systems; Analogous systems
Systems using reradiation of radio waves, e.g. secondary radar systems; Analogous systems
Combinations of radar systems with non-radar systems, e.g. sonar, direction finder
Combinations of radar systems, e.g. primary radar and secondary radar
Radar or analogous systems specially adapted for specific applications (electromagnetic prospecting or detecting of objects, e.g. near-field detection, G01V3/00)
Systems using the reflection or reradiation of acoustic waves, e.g. sonar systems
{Bistatic sonar systems; Multistatic sonar systems}
{Theoretical aspects}
using reflection of acoustic waves (G01S15/66 takes precedence)
Sonar tracking systems
Systems using reradiation of acoustic waves, e.g. IFF, i.e. identification of friend or foe
Combinations of sonar systems with lidar systems; Combinations of sonar systems with systems not using wave reflection
Combinations of sonar systems
Sonar systems specially adapted for specific applications (seismic or acoustic prospecting or detecting G01V1/00)
Systems using the reflection or reradiation of electromagnetic waves other than radio waves, e.g. lidar systems
{Bistatic lidar systems; Multistatic lidar systems}
{Theoretical aspects}
Systems using the reflection of electromagnetic waves other than radio waves (G01S17/66 takes precedence)
Tracking systems using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
Systems using reradiation of electromagnetic waves other than radio waves, e.g. IFF, i.e. identification of friend or foe
Combinations of lidar systems with systems other than lidar, radar or sonar, e.g. with direction finders
Combinations of systems using electromagnetic waves other than radio waves
Lidar systems specially adapted for specific applications
Satellite radio beacon positioning systems; Determining position, velocity or attitude using signals transmitted by such systems
Satellite radio beacon positioning systems transmitting time-stamped messages, e.g. GPS [Global Positioning System], GLONASS [Global Orbiting Navigation Satellite System] or GALILEO
Determining a navigation solution using signals transmitted by a satellite radio beacon positioning system

Indexing scheme relating to beacons or beacon systems transmitting signals capable of being detected by non-directional receivers and defining directions, positions, or position lines fixed relatively to the beacon transmitters
adapted for specific applications or environments
Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more direction or position line determinations; Position-fixing by co-ordinating two or more distance determinations
Transmission of position information to remote stations
specially adapted for specific applications
